Emerald City Mortgage Advisors
Emerald City Mortgage Advisors (ECMA) provides advisor-led mortgage guidance for homebuyers, homeowners, and real estate referral partners in Washington, California, Florida, and Idaho.
About
ECMA helps clients think through mortgage questions — affordability, pre-approval timing, loan-path tradeoffs, and refinance decisions — before moving into a formal application. The firm is led by Scott Warneke, a Licensed Mortgage Loan Officer (NMLS# 278008), operating under NEXA Mortgage, LLC (NMLS# 1660690).
Services

Home purchase guidance (WA, CA, FL, ID)
Refinance review conversations
Real estate agent and referral partner support
Secure document transfer for active clients
Formal application routing via Floify

Contact

Phone: (206) 707-3788
Email: contact@emeraldcitymortgageadvisors.com
Address: 914 164th St SE #381, Mill Creek, WA 98012

Licensing
Scott Warneke | NMLS# 278008 | Licensed in WA, CA, FL, ID
NEXA Mortgage, LLC | NMLS# 1660690 | AZMB #0944059
Equal Housing Lender

Disclaimer
This website is for general education and conversation planning only. It is not a commitment to lend or extend credit. All loans are subject to credit approval, property approval, program guidelines, and underwriting review.
